annotation_target.structure: Middle descent consequent — approaching lowest point
key_moments: m31 maximum harmonic distance from opening
teaching_goals: the descent is reaching its endpoint
sustain the mood of complete austerity
style_tips: no change in dynamic — consistent ppp through the end

teaching_notes.note: The harmonic journey has reached its deepest point — the opening E seems very far away.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 29–32 of Prelude in E Minor, Op. 28 No. 4 (continuation of mm. 25–28), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 29–32 and describe where the bass has traveled.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 29–32.
Measures 29–32 continue the downward journey — the bass is approaching its lowest point and the emotional depth is at its most austere. Let me loop mm. 29–32.
Chopin Prelude E minor mm. 29–32: bass approaching lowest point, austere emotional depth. Pairs with mm. 25–28.
